title: [codereview-pass2] coap_status.c capacity validation updated to allow reporting over-capacity state
description: Security/edge review: removed used>cap guard but MAX checks remain. Overflow state now visible in CBOR (good for clients). No buffer overflow risk as cbor_ctx bounds checked. ENOBUFS now reportable via status callback returning negative. No comments. Pass 2 clean.
close_reason: pass2 clean: security bounds preserved by cbor_ctx; ENOBUFS via callback possible; tests pass
